question_text:
これは＿＿＿ですか。
(What is this?)
options: [{"id": "a", "text": "何 (なん/なに)", "is_correct": true}, {"id": "b", "text": "誰 (だれ)", "is_correct": false}, {"id": "c", "text": "どこ", "is_correct": false}]
hints: [{"type": "grammar", "text": "Objects use 何 (what)"}, {"type": "vocabulary", "text": "なん is used before です"}]
explanation: For objects/things, use 何 (なん/なに) to ask 'what'. 誰 (だれ) is for people, どこ is for places.
を (wo/o) marks the direct object of a verb. For movement verbs like 行く, it marks the destination when there's an object of motion.
